zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermentrude de Ferrers於大約1165年出生在英國林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛時，她的父親William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby30歲，母親Sybil de Braose32歲。她於大約1185年與Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1215年在英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ermentrude de Ferrers于大约1165年出生在英国林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛时，她的父亲William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby30岁，母亲Sybil de Braose32岁。她于大约1185年与Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I在英国英格兰林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1215年在英国越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Ermentrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, adopted from Old French by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It is derived from erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’ + traut ‘beloved’. It did not survive long into the Middle Ages, but was occasionally revived in the 18th and 19th centuries. It is now completely out of fashion.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermentrude de Ferrers was born about 1165, in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, her father, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, was 30 and her mother, Sybil de Braose, was 32. She married Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I about 1185, in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1215, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermentrude de Ferrers est née environ 1165, à Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Braose, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I environ 1185, à Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1215, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ermentrude de Ferrers um 1165 in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby 30 und ihre Mutter Sybil de Braose 32. Sie hat um 1185 in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1215 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ermentrude de Ferrers è nata il circa 1165 nel Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Sybil de Braose, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I circa 1185, nel Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1215, nel Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermentrude de Ferrersが約1165年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアガインスボロウで生まれた時，父William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derbyは30歳，母Sybil de Braoseは32歳であった。約1185年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアガインスボロウでRobert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1215年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermentrude de Ferrers(이)가 대략 1165년 영국 링코실르 게인스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Braose(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 게인스버루에서 Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1215년 영국 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermentrude de Ferrers nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Braose, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I aproximadamente 1185, em Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1215, em Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermentrude de Ferrers родилась около 1165 г. в местности геинсбороую, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Braose, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I около 1185 г. в местности геинсбороую, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1215 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

sm.about 1165–about 1215: e tusa o le 1165–e tusa o le 1215

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ermentrude de Ferrers nació aproximadamente 1165, en Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Sybil de Braose, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I aproximadamente 1185, en Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1215, en Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
